mapper.sql: a.id as id ,a.kecheng_id as kechengId ,a.chapter_name as chapterName ,a.chapter_sort as chapterSort ,a.chapter_summary as chapterSummary ,a.chapter_status as chapterStatus ,a.review_remark as reviewRemark ,a.review_time as reviewTime ,a.review_admin_id as reviewAdminId ,a.is_deleted as isDeleted ,a.create_time as createTime
